allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\mateo\\Desktop\\JIC2026" -Recurse | Where-Object {$_.PSIsContainer -eq $false} | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($items = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\mateo\\Desktop\\JIC2026" -Recurse -Force; $files = $items | Where-Object {-not $_.PSIsContainer}; $dirs = $items | Where-Object {$_.PSIsContainer}; Write-Host "Directory Summary:"; Write-Host "  Total Directories: $\($dirs.Count\)"; Write-Host "  Total Files: $\($files.Count\)"; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "Files by Type:"; $files | Group-Object Extension | Select-Object @{Name="Extension"; Expression={if\($_.Name -eq ""\){".no-extension"} else {$_.Name}}}, @{Name="Count"; Expression={$_.Count}} | Sort-Object Extension | Format-Table -AutoSize)
